title: Hadrolaelia spectabilis
taxonomy: Hadrolaelia spectabilis is a species of orchid, and as such, its classification falls under the kingdom Plantae. More specifically, it is classified under the family Orchidaceae, commonly known as the orchid family. Within this family, Hadrolaelia spectabilis is further categorized under the subfamily Epidendroideae and the tribe Cymbidieae. Its classification at the genus level is also worth noting, as Hadrolaelia is a genus of orchids that is endemic to Brazil. Overall, the classification of Hadrolaelia spectabilis reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history within the plant kingdom.
